name: Moroccan Chicken Tagine (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 2 frozen barbecued chickens with sauce, defrosted
8 ounces frozen chopped peppers and onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the barbecue sauce from the defrosted chickens and set aside.
2. Cut each chicken into 8 pieces and place, skin side up, in a baking pan.
3. Remove any fat from the reserved sauce. Place 2 cups of sauce in a large microwave-safe dish.
4. Discard the remaining sauce. Mix in peppers and onions, brandy, dried fruits, tomatoes, five-spice powder, carrots, garlic powder, honey, lemon juice, and parsley.
5. Partially cover and microwave on high for 7 minutes, or until the dried fruits are fork-tender.
6. Pour the sauce and its contents over the chicken and marinate overnight.
7. Sprinkle with almonds and bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 45 minutes, or until heated through completely.
8. Garnish with parsley before serving. This dish pairs well with a couscous mix (cooks in 5 minutes) or barley pilaf (microwaves in 8 minutes). Follow package directions.
Yield: 10 to 12 servings
Note: You can also use dried Mission figs.
Nutritional information per serving: Calories: 374, Protein: 35 grams, Carbohydrates: 35 grams, Fat: 5 grams, Cholesterol: 88 milligrams, Sodium: 363 milligrams.
